scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace frontend typecheck && yarn workspace backend typecheck
scripts.lint: yarn workspace frontend lint && yarn workspace backend lint
scripts.lint:fix: yarn workspace frontend lint:fix && yarn workspace backend lint:fix
scripts.format: yarn workspace frontend format && yarn workspace backend format
scripts.clean:meta: rimraf .yarn/cache .yarn/install-state.* .pnp.* yarn.lock backend/dist backend/node_modules frontend/dist frontend/node_modules
scripts.build:fast: concurrently "yarn workspace frontend build:fast" "yarn workspace backend build"
scripts.build: concurrently "yarn workspace frontend build" "yarn workspace backend build"
